creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241927
Patch to update emulators/wine-devel from 7.x to 8.4

I see wine-devel has not been updated yet this year, so here is a patch
that brings it from 7.x to 8.4.

files/patch-configure is a hack to restore build with a mixture of GCC
("native") and clang (MinGW), which is what may have been holding up the
update based in my last conversation with Damjan in December.


Everyone, please feel free to copy anyone interested in Wine on FreeBSD
for input and testing.
